LanguageData.HAR_OT_Drag_a.label: Angelocaine
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Drag_a.description:
A drug spread throughout the underworld by Haos.
Through special processing, its alcoholic components are condensed without waste.
Taking it produces long-lasting euphoria.

Unlike many other drugs, which carry a dangerous addiction risk,
Angelocaine is comparatively safer, being closer to alcohol dependence.
Its low production cost helped it explode in popularity across the underworld, becoming one of the main reasons Haos rose to power.
